childrenInKinshipCare.note: Children living in kinship care arrangements in England (grandparents, aunts, uncles, family friends)

specialGuardianshipOrders.note: Special Guardianship Orders granted annually in England and Wales

kinshipCarerPoverty.note: Percentage of kinship carers living in households below 60% median income

sources.name: Kinship
sources.dataset: State of Kinship Care in England

metadata.methodology: Kinship care numbers from Kinship charity research combined with DfE looked-after children census data. SGO figures from MoJ family court statistics. Poverty rates from Kinship national survey (self-reported household income against HBAI poverty threshold).
knownIssues: Kinship care numbers are estimates; England has no national register of kinship arrangements
Many informal kinship carers have no legal order and are invisible to statistics
Poverty survey data is self-reported and may not align with DWP household income definitions
